name: Almond-Coconut Twinkles
recipeIngredient: 1 1/3 cups sifted Pillsbury's Best All-Purpose Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. Cream butter and gradually add sugar, creaming well.
4. Blend in egg whites, vanilla, and almond extract; beat well.
5. Add coconut and the dry ingredients; mix well.
6. Drop by rounded teaspoonfuls onto greased baking sheets.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10 to 12 minutes until delicate golden brown.
For use with Pillsbury's Best Self-Rising Flour, omit baking powder and salt.
(Note: The original recipe text was kept exactly as provided, with only minor corrections made to the instructions section for clarity.)
